unit.name: Nyxa
unit.gameplay_identity: Marksman calibration unit carrying Sanguine, Chronomancer through one decisive combat silhouette.
unit.strongest_preserved_hook: asymmetrical time-bow grown from spine and wing finger
unit.dominant_prop_or_anatomy: asymmetrical time-bow grown from spine and wing finger
unit.supernatural_cost: each extra arrow ages one side of her face and drains blood into older scars

psychology.core_wound: Choosing one future forced every other possible life to die in her memory at once.
psychology.private_want: She wants every possible future to remain available as ammunition so no choice can ever become final.
psychology.primary_fear: A single irreversible timeline will trap her in one aging body and prove the unchosen lives are gone.
psychology.survival_strategy: She hoards possible futures and fires them as parallel attacks.
psychology.villainous_distortion: Other lives become expendable timelines she consumes to avoid accepting her own ending.
psychology.current_emotional_state: Ecstatic predatory delight at making several deaths coexist.
psychology.emotional_contradiction: Ancient grief over lost futures versus feral pleasure in spending them.
psychology.face_direction: The asymmetric aged face narrows both eyes on the target; one mouth corner curls with delight while the other side is pulled tight by temporal pain.
psychology.pose_direction: A clawed crouch compresses behind the spinal membrane bow, body split into incompatible ages along the firing axis.
psychology.forbidden_read: No ordinary old woman, generic crone, glamorous vampire, fragile elder, decorative bat archer, or age-as-the-only-horror.

visible_face_evidence.feeling: Current feeling is visible as Ecstatic predatory delight at making several deaths coexist.
visible_face_evidence.want: The visible intent supports this private want: She wants every possible future to remain available as ammunition so no choice can ever become final.
visible_face_evidence.fear_or_concealment: The face visibly guards against this fear: A single irreversible timeline will trap her in one aging body and prove the unchosen lives are gone.
visible_face_evidence.active_survival_strategy: Face and posture enact this survival strategy: She hoards possible futures and fires them as parallel attacks.
visible_face_evidence.villainous_read: The visible behavior expresses this distortion: Other lives become expendable timelines she consumes to avoid accepting her own ending.
visible_face_evidence.cited_visual_cues: Face cue: The asymmetric aged face narrows both eyes on the target; one mouth corner curls with delight while the other side is pulled tight by temporal pain. Pose cue: A clawed crouch compresses behind the spinal membrane bow, body split into incompatible ages along the firing axis.

professional_standard.benchmark_comparison: The immutable Round 6 evidence compares nyxa directly with approved matte Vellum and all eleven calibration peers at master, face, and exact-96 scales.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for nyxa: Batlike temporal predator reads before age, supporting the deliberate-horror exception.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, nyxa meets or exceeds the professional floor for audience_and_intent_fit.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for nyxa: Dry membrane, fur, bone, scars, and clotted string retain detailed material control.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, nyxa meets or exceeds the professional floor for craft_and_finish.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for nyxa: The asymmetrical time-bow and age-split face share one ranged predatory axis.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, nyxa meets or exceeds the professional floor for coherence_and_hierarchy.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for nyxa: Her wing-spine bow and compressed bat anatomy do not overlap other marksmen or monsters.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, nyxa meets or exceeds the professional floor for distinctiveness.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for nyxa: Exception record, triptych, master, face, exact derivative, and source lineage are complete.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, nyxa meets or exceeds the professional floor for completeness_and_downstream_usability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for nyxa: Long bow arc and folded batlike body remain highly recognizable at 96px.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, nyxa meets or exceeds the professional floor for silhouette_and_96px_readability.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for nyxa: Predatory eye lock, asymmetric pain, delighted mouth, and clawed crouch show ecstatic cruelty.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, nyxa meets or exceeds the professional floor for psychology_and_villain_read.

critical_dimensions.evidence: Board-observed evidence for nyxa: Chronomancer age displacement leads; Sanguine is confined to blood exchange and string.
critical_dimensions.benchmark_comparison: Against the approved hard-matte Vellum anchor and the full role-grouped roster boards, nyxa meets or exceeds the professional floor for production_feasibility_and_trait_clarity.

professional_standard.rejection_case: The strongest honest rejection case was tested against the native evidence, derivative lineage, anatomy, trait channels, and roster comparisons and did not survive cross-examination.
professional_standard.excellence_gap: Later production may further refine micro-material transitions, but no gap falls below the professional concept-art floor or weakens the locked identity.

cross_examination.outcome: All decisive claims survived the one permitted cross-examination; no unrefuted blocker remains.
